markdown.markdown: ::: {.doc-subject} Orchestrate fleets of Claude Code agents across pluggable backends like cmux and superset. ::: ::: {.doc-signature .doc-Kind.FUNCTION} ```bash cc-orchestrate [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]... ``` ::: ::: {.details summary="Full --help output"} ::: {.cli-manpage} ``` Usage: cc-orchestrate [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]... Orchestrate fleets of Claude Code agents across pluggable backends like cmux and superset. Options: --version Show the version and exit. --help Show this message and exit. Commands: backends List supported backends and whether each is installed on this... ``` ::: ::: ## Options {.doc-parameters} ::: {.doc-definition-items} --version : Show the version and exit. ::: ## Commands {.doc-parameters} ::: {.doc-definition-items} [backends]{.doc-parameter-name} : [List supported backends and whether each is installed on this machine.](backends.qmd) :::

<style>
/* Great Docs: accent_color overrides */
:root, html.quarto-light, :root[data-bs-theme='light'] {
    --gd-accent: #ee5d7a;
}
html.quarto-dark, :root[data-bs-theme='dark'] {
    --gd-accent: #ee5d7a;
}
</style>

<style>
/* Great Docs: navbar_color overrides */
html.quarto-light, :root[data-bs-theme='light'] {
    --gd-navbar-bg: #131722;
    --gd-navbar-text: #FFFFFF;
}
html.quarto-light, :root[data-bs-theme='light'] .navbar {
    background: #131722 !important;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
}
html.quarto-light, :root[data-bs-theme='light'] .navbar .navbar-title,
html.quarto-light, :root[data-bs-theme='light'] .navbar .nav-link {
    color: #FFFFFF !important;
}
html.quarto-light, :root[data-bs-theme='light'] .navbar .nav-link:hover {
    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) !important;
    color: #FFFFFF !important;
}

    background-color: transparent !important;
}

    text-decoration-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75) !important;
}
html.quarto-light, :root[data-bs-theme='light'] .navbar .dark-mode-toggle,

}

}

}

}
